title: The revised common law rule as to the immunity of foreign sovereign states from the jurisdiction of the English courts

evidence.clean_text: It was the judgment of Lord Denning MR in Trendtex Trading Corporation v Central Bank of Nigeria [1977] QB 529 that marked the definitive absorption by the common law of the restrictive theory of sovereign immunity. Lord Denning's statement in Trendtex as to what had become the revised common law rule as to the immunity of foreign sovereign states from the jurisdiction of the English courts, before the passing of the SIA 1978, received the approval of the House of Lords in I Congreso del Partido [1983] AC 244.
